rules.action: Maintain a safe distance, reduce speed to 10 mph, and be prepared to stop if the person moves closer
Maintain heightened awareness, avoid sudden maneuvers, and prepare for potential unexpected movements
Maintain a safe distance of at least 10 meters from the bicycle to avoid potential collision
